LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS DIANE NELSON, RICHARD BAUMERT, MISSION STREET DEVELOPMENT LLC, AND MISSION STREET HOLDINGS LLC'S MOTION TO (1) COMPEL ARBITRATION, AND (2) DISMISS OR STAY THE CASE IS GRANTED. ARBITRATION IS COMPELLED AND THIS ACTION IS STAYED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THAT THE AGREEMENT IS EITHER SUBSTANTIVELY OR PROCEDURALLY UNCONSCIONABLE AND ALL DEFENDANTS ARE ENTITLED TO ARBITRATE BECAUSE ALL CLAIMS ARISE FROM THEIR ACTIVITIES ON BEHALF OF THE SELLER IN CONNECTION WITH THE SALE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-07-2009 CONTINUED TO FEB-11-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR STATUS OF BINDING ARBITRATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

Notice Of Motion To (1) Comple Arbitration And (2) Dismiss Or Stay The Case
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. RACHEL CHATMAN OF THE LAW FIRM OF K & L GATES, TEL. NO. 882-8003 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ROBERT S. STEIN III, TEL. NO. (714) 852-6800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS DIANE NELSON, RICHARD BAUMERT, MISSION STREET DEVELOPMENT LLC AND MISSION STREET HOLDINGS L L C'S Motion To (1) Compel Arbitration And (2) Dismiss Or Stay The Case IS GRANTED. ARBITRATION IS COMPELLED AND THIS ACTION IS STAYED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THAT THE AGREEMENT IS EITHER SUBSTANTIVELY OR PROCEDURALLY UNCONSCIONABLE AND ALL DEFENDANTS ARE ENTITLED TO ARBITRATE BECAUSE ALL CLAIMS ARISE FROM THEIR ACTIVITIES ON BEHALF OF THE SELLER IN CONNECTION WITH THE SALE. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/AY
